text: 知识可以传授，但智慧不能。人们可以寻见智慧，在生命中体现智慧，但人们不可能去传授和教导智慧。
author: 悉达多

text: 我通过我的灵魂与肉体得知，堕落乃为必需。我必经历贪欲，我必去追逐财富，体验恶心，陷于绝望的深渊，并由此学会去抵御它们。
author: 悉达多

text: 一个人如果通过爱、观察和体验去认识世界，那么他就不会评判世界。
author: 悉达多

text: Rule No.1: Never lose money. Rule No.2: Never forget rule No.1.
author: Warren Buffett

text: Price is what you pay. Value is what you get.
author: Warren Buffett

text: It takes 20 years to build a reputation and five minutes to ruin it. If you think about that, you'll do things differently.
author: Warren Buffett

text: 真正的大师，永远都怀着一颗学徒的心。
author: 易大师

text: 荣耀存于心，而非留于名。
author: 亚索

text: Mamba mentality is about trying to be the best version of yourself.
author: Kobe Bryant

text: The most important thing is to try and inspire people so that they can be great at whatever they want to do.
author: Kobe Bryant

text: I like criticism. It makes you strong.
author: LeBron James

text: You can't be afraid to fail. It's the only way you succeed.
author: LeBron James
